series_metadata.series_title: Putative Father''s Registry Final Certification No.
series_metadata.series_description: Files contain Final Certification Notice, JFS-01697 and match of father. May also contain copies of the Registration form, JFS-01694 (Father’s form that is filed if he wants to prevent the adoption), letter of receipt, Search Request form, JFS-01695 (Mother’s form that is filed to look for a system match). Information is available on the Internet.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office child’s 21st birthday. when no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Maintain data in Putative Father’s Registry system permanently. A copy will be retained off-site by MMIS disaster recovery purposes. Certification Notices on diskette permanently
